# rubrik_self_serve_rolling_upgrade (Resource)

The `rubrik_self_serve_rolling_upgrade` resource manages the account-wide
self-serve rolling upgrade setting in RSC.

This is a singleton resource. Only one instance per RSC tenant is meaningful;
managing the same setting in multiple Terraform workspaces will cause drift.

Deleting the resource removes it from Terraform state but leaves the underlying
RSC toggle unchanged. To disable the feature, apply with `enabled = false`
before removing the resource block.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Enable self-serve rolling upgrade account-wide. Only one instance of this
# resource is meaningful per RSC tenant.
resource "rubrik_self_serve_rolling_upgrade" "account" {
  enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether self-serve rolling upgrade is enabled for the account.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Singleton ID. Always `self_serve_rolling_upgrade`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Singleton resource: the import ID is ignored, any value works.
% terraform import rubrik_self_serve_rolling_upgrade.account anything
```
